mergewith.subtemplate:
<!-- Multi rate tree --> <taxonset id='TaxonSet.$(n)' spec='beast.base.evolution.alignment.TaxonSet' alignment='@$(n)' />
<plugin spec='sr.evolution.tree.SRTree' id='Tree.t:$(n)' estimate='true'> <taxonset idref='TaxonSet.$(n)'/> </plugin>
<plugin id='TreeHeight.t:$(n)' spec='beast.base.evolution.tree.TreeHeightLogger' tree='@Tree.t:$(n)'/>
<logger id='treelog.t:$(n)' spec='beast.base.inference.Logger' logEvery="1000" fileName="$(tree).trees" mode='tree'> <log id='TreeWithMetaDataLogger.t:$(n)' spec='beast.base.evolution.TreeWithMetaDataLogger' tree='@Tree.t:$(n)'> </log> </logger>
<distribution id="morphTreeLikelihood.$(n)" spec='TreeLikelihood' tree='@Tree.t:$(n)'> <data spec="beast.base.evolution.alignment.FilteredAlignment" id='$(n)' filter="0-end"> <userDataType spec='beast.base.evolution.datatype.StandardData' id='morphDataType.$(n)' /> </data> <siteModel spec='SiteModel' id="SiteModel.s:$(n)" gammaCategoryCount='0'> <mutationRate spec='parameter.RealParameter' id='mutationRate.s:$(n)' value='1.0' estimate='true'/> <shape spec='parameter.RealParameter' id='gammaShape.s:$(n)' value='1.0' estimate='false'/> <!-- MK subst model --> <substModel spec="morphmodels.evolution.substitutionmodel.LewisMK" id="LewisMK.s:$(n)" datatype='@morphDataType.$(n)'/> </siteModel> <branchRateModel id="StrictClock.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.evolution.branchratemodel.StrictClockModel"> <parameter id="clockRate.c:$(n)" name="clock.rate" value="1.0" estimate='false'/> </branchRateModel> </distribution>
<prior id='ClockPrior.c:$(n)' x='@clockRate.c:$(n)'> <distr spec="beast.base.inference.distribution.Uniform" upper='Infinity'/> </prior> <prior id='MutationRatePrior.s:$(n)' x='@mutationRate.s:$(n)'> <distr spec="OneOnX"/> </prior> <prior id='GammaShapePrior.s:$(n)' x='@gammaShape.s:$(n)'> <distr spec="beast.base.inference.distribution.Exponential" mean='1'/> </prior>
<operator id='mutationRateScaler.s:$(n)' spec='ScaleOperator' scaleFactor="0.5" weight="0.1" parameter="@mutationRate.s:$(n)"/> <operator id='gammaShapeScaler.s:$(n)' spec='ScaleOperator' scaleFactor="0.5" weight="0.1" parameter="@gammaShape.s:$(n)"/>
<operator id='allTipDatesRandomWalker.t:$(n)' spec='TipDatesRandomWalker' windowSize="1" weight="0" tree="@Tree.t:$(n)"/>
<operator id='StrictClockRateScaler.c:$(n)' spec='ScaleOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3" parameter='@clockRate.c:$(n)'/> <!-- need updown operator for clockRate?!? Also in SubstModel.xml --> <upDownOperator id='strictClockUpDownOperator.c:$(n)' spec='UpDownOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3"> <up idref="clockRate.c:$(n)"/> <down idref="Tree.t:$(n)"/> </upDownOperator>
<!-- SRange Birth Death model--> <SRangesBirthDeathModel spec="sr.speciation.SRangesBirthDeathModel" id="SR.t:$(n)" tree="@Tree.t:$(n)" conditionOnRhoSampling="true"> <parameter name="origin" id="originSR.t:$(n)" value ="100.0" lower="0."/> <parameter name="diversificationRate" id="diversificationRateSR.t:$(n)" value="1." lower="0."/> <parameter name="turnover" id="turnoverSR.t:$(n)" value=".5" lower="0." upper="1."/> <parameter name="samplingProportion" id="samplingProportionSR.t:$(n)" value="0.5" lower="0." upper="1."/> <parameter estimate="false" name="rho" id="rhoSR.t:$(n)" value="1.0" lower="0." upper = "1."/> <parameter name="removalProbability" id="rSR.t:$(n)" value="0." lower="0." upper="1."/> </SRangesBirthDeathModel>
<distribution id='originPriorSR.t:$(n)' x="@originSR.t:$(n)" spec='beast.base.inference.distribution.Prior'> <distr spec='beast.base.inference.distribution.Uniform' lower="0." upper="Infinity"/> </distribution> <distribution id="diversificationRatePriorSR.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.inference.distribution.Prior" x="@diversificationRateSR.t:$(n)"> <distr spec='beast.base.inference.distribution.Uniform' lower="0." upper="Infinity"/> </distribution> <distribution id="turnoverPriorSR.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.inference.distribution.Prior" x="@turnoverSR.t:$(n)"> <distr spec='beast.base.inference.distribution.Uniform' lower="0." upper="1."/> </distribution> <distribution id="samplingProportionPriorSR.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.inference.distribution.Prior" x="@samplingProportionSR.t:$(n)"> <distr spec='beast.base.inference.distribution.Uniform' lower="0." upper="1."/> </distribution> <distribution id="rhoPriorSR.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.inference.distribution.Prior" x="@rhoSR.t:$(n)"> <distr spec='beast.base.inference.distribution.Uniform' lower="0." upper="1."/> </distribution>
<operator id='originScalerSR.t:$(n)' spec='ScaleOperator' scaleFactor=".75" weight="3" parameter="@originSR.t:$(n)"/> <operator id='divRateScalerSR.t:$(n)' spec='ScaleOperator' scaleFactor=".75" weight="10" parameter="@diversificationRateSR.t:$(n)"/> <operator id='turnoverScalerSR.t:$(n)' spec='ScaleOperator' scaleFactor=".75" weight="10" parameter="@turnoverSR.t:$(n)"/> <operator id='samplingPScalerSR.t:$(n)' spec='ScaleOperator' scaleFactor=".75" weight="10" parameter="@samplingProportionSR.t:$(n)"/> <operator id='rhoScalerSR.t:$(n)' spec='ScaleOperator' scaleFactor=".9" weight="1" parameter="@rhoSR.t:$(n)"/>
<!-- FIXME Multi-rate tree operators -->
<operator id='SRLeafToSampledAncestorJump.t:$(n)' spec="sr.evolution.operators.SRLeafToSampledAncestorJump" weight="20" tree="@Tree.t:$(n)"/> <operator id='SRWilsonBalding.t:$(n)' spec='sr.evolution.operators.SRWilsonBalding' weight="10" tree="@Tree.t:$(n)"/> <operator id='SATreeRootScalerSR.t:$(n)' spec='sa.evolution.operators.SAScaleOperator' scaleFactor=".95" weight="1" tree="@Tree.t:$(n)" rootOnly='true'/> <operator id='SATreeScalerSR.t:$(n)' spec='sa.evolution.operators.SAScaleOperator' scaleFactor=".95" weight="3" tree="@Tree.t:$(n)"/> <operator id='LeftRightChildSwap.t:$(n)' spec='sr.evolution.operators.LeftRightChildSwap' weight="5" tree="@Tree.t:$(n)"/>
<plugin id='SRCountSR.t:$(n)' spec='sr.evolution.tree.SampledAncestorLogger' tree='@Tree.t:$(n)'/>
Scales mutation rate of partition s:$(n) Scales gamma shape parameter of partition s:$(n) Scale clock rate of partition c:$(n)
Scale up substitution rate c:$(n) and scale down tree t:($n)
Estimates tip dates for tree t:$(n)
Prior on gamma shape for partition s:$(n)
prior on originSR.t:$(n) prior on diversificationRateSR.t:$(n) prior on turnoverSR.t:$(n) prior on samplingProportionSR.t:$(n) prior on rSR.t:$(n)
